name: Plot Handover Print Format

This certificate confirms that {{ company_doc.company_name }}, represented by {{ doc.handed_over_by }}{% if doc.handed_over_by_title %} ({{ doc.handed_over_by_title }}){% endif %}, has on {{ frappe.format(doc.handover_date, {"fieldtype": "Date"}) }} formally handed over full possession of Plot {{ doc.plot }} to {{ doc.received_by }}, in accordance with Plot Contract {{ doc.contract }}. All contractual obligations have been fulfilled and the plot is hereby delivered to the receiving party.
